use_cases: Display team members on company About or Team pages
Showcase staff profiles with roles and social links for agencies
Present crew members for production companies like photography or film studios
Feature contributors or team members on portfolio and creative platform landing pages
Build organization charts with photos for internal directory pages
ai_summary: A professional team showcase component displaying team members in a responsive grid layout with gradient-bordered cards. Each member card features a circular avatar, name, role title, and social media icon links. The design uses a dark theme with neutral tones and includes hover interactions for enhanced engagement. Ideal for displaying team members on agency portfolios, production company pages, SaaS about sections, or any company directory requiring a polished team presentation.
